name: goofish-sale-statistics
description: 基于开源组件实现的闲鱼销售统计后台示例系统

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w server
scripts.start: npm run preflight -w server && npm run start -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w web
scripts.release:v1: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run smoke:release && npm run package:release
